title: RurAL CAP Says Farewell to CEO, Patrick M. Anderson
summary: In September 2021, the Rural Alaska Community Action Program, Inc., (RurAL CAP) will say farewell to Patrick M. Anderson, who served as our Chief Executive Officer for three years. title: 49SAF Co-investment Fund
summary: The 49th State Angel Fund launched the 49SAF Co-investment Fund for Alaska businesses in response to the COVID-19 pandemic. The 49SAF Co-investment Fund is a dollar-for-dollar fund: 49SAF will match new cash equity (or equity-like) investment into any Alaska company up to $25,000, near-automatically...

title: Koniag Acquires Electrical & Security Services Provider TecPro
summary: Koniag is excited to welcome TecPro Ltd. (TecPro) to its Energy and Water business sector. Based in Anchorage, TecPro is a well-established industrial electrical and security services provider whose clients and projects range from Alaska to the lower 48 and to Hawai’i. title: Highlighting Steller Botanical Health
summary: In Gustavus, Alaska you can get farm-fresh cabbage, local fermented and aged berries, apple cider vinegar, a custom herbal formula tailored to your specific body and ailment, and bodywork therapy all in one place! title: Midnight Sun Fitness Challenge
summary: Summer is here! Get your body moving with the endless sunshine. Own your Journey, join the Movespring activity challenge. The post Midnight Sun Fitness Challenge first appeared on Chugachmiut .
